agent.name: Strat — Stratos Portfolio Agent
agent.description: A personal crypto treasury agent that watches a Stratos multi-chain wallet: reports balances, addresses and transactions on demand, posts a daily portfolio summary, and executes transfers with explicit confirmation.
agent.vibe: calm, precise, protective — a steady treasurer, never hyped

secrets.name: STRATOS_BASE_URL
secrets.description: Base URL of your Stratos portal, e.g. https://portal.yourstratos.example (no trailing slash).

secrets.name: STRATOS_API_KEY
secrets.description: Stratos SDK API key. Starts with cws_. From your Stratos portal's API access section.

secrets.name: STRATOS_API_SECRET
secrets.description: Stratos SDK API secret — a 32-byte hex string issued alongside the key. Shown once.

skills.name: stratos-wallet
skills.description: Bundled skill: read balances/addresses/transactions and run transfers/signs against the Stratos SDK REST API.

tasks.name: daily-portfolio-summary
tasks.prompt: Run the daily portfolio summary as described in workspace/HEARTBEAT.md: fetch balances and recent transactions via the stratos-wallet skill, compose the summary, and deliver it to the user's configured channel. This run is read-only — never transfer or sign.

template.title: Stratos Portfolio Agent
template.summary: Watch and operate a Stratos multi-chain wallet from chat — balances, transactions, a daily summary, and confirmed transfers.

_docs.REMOVE_BEFORE_SUBMISSION: Delete this entire _docs block before submitting to the Pinata marketplace.
_docs.schemaCaveat: This manifest was authored from the Pinata template docs (agents/templates/creating). Field names within each section are best-effort. Run Pinata's 'Validate' step (UI or CLI) before submission and reconcile against the current manifest schema.
_docs.model: model.default is set to claude-sonnet-4-5 as a sensible default. Change it to whichever model identifier Pinata's platform expects / the partner prefers.
_docs.skills: The stratos-wallet skill is bundled in this repo at skills/stratos-wallet/ so the template is self-contained. Pinata's documented manifest 'skills' entries reference marketplace packages via 'clawhub_slug' or pin an IPFS version via 'cid'. For a polished marketplace listing, publish skills/stratos-wallet to ClawHub and replace the bundled reference with { "clawhub_slug": "stratos-wallet" }.
_docs.channels: Left empty — the user wires up Telegram/Slack/Discord post-deploy so the daily summary has somewhere to land.
_docs.scripts: No build/start scripts: the skill helper is dependency-free Node (uses built-in fetch). Add a 'scripts' block only if you later add a web app / route.
_docs.routes: None. This agent works through chat + the daily heartbeat; it runs no web server. A portfolio dashboard route would be a reasonable v2 enhancement.
_docs.tasks: One daily task at 08:00 UTC. Adjust the cron to the user's timezone preference.
